description: Deterministic semantic contract suite for package qualification resolution behavior in sv_stimuli_quality_gate.

cases.name: declared_package_reference_pass
cases.input: package pkg; localparam int X = 1; endpackage module top; int y; assign y = pkg::X; endmodule

cases.name: imported_package_reference_pass
cases.input: import cfg_pkg::*; module top; int y; assign y = cfg_pkg::CONST; endmodule

cases.name: unresolved_package_reference_fail
cases.input: module top; int y; assign y = ghost_pkg::CONST; endmodule

cases.name: mixed_resolved_and_unresolved_fail
cases.input: package good_pkg; localparam int V = 3; endpackage module top; int a; int b; assign a = good_pkg::V; assign b = bad_pkg::W; endmodule

cases.name: multi_imported_packages_pass
cases.input: import p1::*; import p2::item; module top; int a; int b; assign a = p1::A; assign b = p2::item; endmodule

cases.name: comment_noise_pass
cases.input:
/* package p_fake; endpackage */ package real_pkg; localparam int A = 1; endpackage // import ghost::*
module top; int x; assign x = real_pkg::A; endmodule

cases.name: package_decl_without_use_pass
cases.input: package keep_pkg; localparam int A = 0; endpackage module top; int x; assign x = 0; endmodule

cases.name: type_reference_unresolved_fail
cases.input: module top; typedef missing_pkg::t_t thing_t; endmodule

cases.name: macro_qualified_package_reference_pass
cases.input: package cfg_pkg; localparam int V = 2; endpackage module top; int y; `define GOOD_PKG_REF cfg_pkg::V assign y = `GOOD_PKG_REF; endmodule

cases.name: macro_qualified_package_reference_fail
cases.input: module top; int y; `define BAD_PKG_REF bad_pkg::X assign y = `BAD_PKG_REF; endmodule
